snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚Äî and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 ‚Äî The pacifier hack 

2:42 ‚Äî A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ‚Äî The getting along/best friends‚Äô shirt 

7:20 ‚Äî Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 ‚Äî Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ‚Äî How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ‚Äî DIY ring 

2:48 ‚Äî Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 ‚Äî DIY hair comb 

6:53 ‚Äî Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 ‚Äî DIY fake nails
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

All product and company names shown in the video are trademarks‚Ñ¢ or registered¬Æ trademarks of their respective holders. Use of them does not imply any affiliation with or endorsement by them.

snippet.title: Budinca duo cu ciocolata si mascarpone / Desertul care a innebunit Tiktok-ul | JamilaCuisine
snippet.description:
Daca activati pe TikTok, cu siguranta ati auzit de "sa fac spume daca stiu". O reteta care a fost facuta dintr-o gluma si care a acaparat pe toata lumea. Pentru ca si pe mine m-au provocat foarte multi oameni s-o fac, am venit cu varianta mea imbunatatita. Budinca super fina cu ciocolata si mascarpone, cu un gust minunat si o aroma extraordinara.

GOALS FROM ALL OTHER MATCHDAYS WILL BE AVAILABLE TO VIEW WORLDWIDE FROM MIDNIGHT AFTER THE MATCH.

The SPFL is the leading sporting competition in Scotland, covering the top 42 football teams in the country. Subscribe to the official SPFL YouTube channel to make sure you catch all the best bits from Scottish league football. Scottish football is famous for passionate and exciting matches featuring top teams like Celtic, Rangers, Aberdeen, Hearts, Hibs and Dundee United.

The top league is called the Scottish Premiership. Below the top level, there are a further three leagues -- the Scottish Championship, Scottish League 1 and Scottish League 2.

snippet.description:
Riverdale 5x04 "Purgatorio" Season 5 Episode 4 Promo - SEVEN-YEAR TIME JUMP ‚Äî After spending seven years away from Riverdale, Archie (KJ Apa) returns to find the town is now under Hiram Lodge‚Äôs (Mark Consuelos) grip and on the verge of becoming a ghost town. When Toni (Vanessa Morgan) catches him up on what‚Äôs been going on, Archie reaches out to the rest of the gang to return home. Lili Reinhart, Camila Mendes, Cole Sprouse, Madelaine Petsch, Casey Cott, Charles Melton, Drew Ray Tanner and Erinn Westbrook also star. Steve Adelson directed the episode written by Roberto Aguirre-Sacasa (#504). Original airdate 2/10/2021. Subscribe to tvpromosdb on Youtube for more Riverdale season 5 promos in HD!

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we‚Äôre going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let‚Äôs head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don‚Äôt need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle ‚Äî you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 ‚Äî Perfectly round crepes
2:02 ‚Äî No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 ‚Äî Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 ‚Äî DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 ‚Äî A way to cut package tape 
8:12 ‚Äî DIY compass using three pencils

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

All product and company names shown in the video are trademarks‚Ñ¢ or registered¬Æ trademarks of their respective holders. Use of them does not imply any affiliation with or endorsement by them.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong ‚Äì Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬Ý
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong,‚Äù the next epic adventure in Legendary‚Äôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong‚Äù as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans‚Äîinstigated by unseen forces‚Äîis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (‚ÄúBig Little Lies,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Little Drummer Girl‚Äù), Millie Bobby Brown (‚ÄúStranger Things‚Äù), Rebecca Hall (‚ÄúChristine,‚Äù ‚ÄúProfessor Marston and the Wonder Women‚Äù), Brian Tyree Henry (‚ÄúJoker,‚Äù ‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse‚Äù), Shun Oguri (‚ÄúWeathering with You‚Äù), Eiza Gonz√°lez (‚ÄúFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw‚Äù), Julian Dennison (‚ÄúDeadpool 2‚Äù), with Kyle Chandler (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù) and Demi√°n Bichir (‚ÄúThe Nun,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Hateful Eight‚Äù).
Wingard (‚ÄúThe Guest,‚Äù ‚ÄúYou‚Äôre Next‚Äù) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (‚ÄúThor: Ragnarok‚Äù) and Max Borenstein (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚Äù ‚ÄúKong: Skull Island‚Äù), story by Terry Rossio (‚ÄúPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales‚Äù) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù), based on the character ‚ÄúGodzilla‚Äù owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (‚ÄúThe Mummy,‚Äù ‚ÄúWorld War Z‚Äù), production designers Owen Paterson (‚ÄúJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,‚Äù ‚ÄúGodzilla‚Äù) and Thomas S. Hammock (‚ÄúBlair Witch‚Äù), editor Josh Schaeffer (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters‚Äù), costume designer Ann Foley (‚ÄúSkyscraper‚Äù) and visual effects supervisor John ‚ÄúDJ‚Äù DesJardin (upcoming ‚ÄúZack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, ‚ÄúGodzilla vs. Kong.‚Äù  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceX‚Äôs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äì approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.
